title: Information Retrieval
body: Information retrieval uses indexing ranking and evaluation to support search.

title: Database Optimization
body: Database optimization uses query plans indexes joins and cardinality estimates.

title: Metadata Provenance
body: Metadata provenance and traceability improve knowledge system governance.

title: Search Architecture
body: Search architecture combines documents metadata inverted indexes ranking filters and logs.

title: Vector Embeddings
body: Vector embeddings support semantic similarity search and retrieval augmented systems.
